summary: Iteration 19: Real Content Migration testing complete. All 16 backend tests PASSED. All frontend UI tests PASSED. Fixed MyJourneyPage runtime error (missing CATEGORY_CONFIG keys). Backend correctly returns: 7 courses (3 ICF + 4 enrichment), 3 real events, NO events mixed in training courses. Frontend correctly displays: WelcomePage with solid color hero (no stock photos), 'Cosa puoi fare qui' with 4 cards, 'A chi si rivolge' section, real school story (2018-2025 history), 3 real trainers (Arianna Perrone MCC, Emanuele Ciccarelli PCC, Emanuele Casero PCC), Calendly CTA. TrainingCoursesPage shows 2 sections (ICF + enrichment). CourseDetailPage shows real data with no testimonials/stock photos. Events page shows 3 real events.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend _ensure_catalog_seed() correctly seeds 7 real courses with proper section field (icf/enrichment)
Backend _ensure_events_seed() correctly seeds 3 real events in courses_events collection
Backend _collect_training_courses() correctly excludes events from training list
Frontend WelcomePage has solid color hero (#2D2649) with no stock photos
Frontend WelcomePage shows real school story with 2018, 2021, 2024, 2025 milestones
Frontend WelcomePage shows 3 real trainers with correct credentials (MCC ICF, PCC ICF, Integral Coach)
Frontend TrainingCoursesPage correctly splits courses into 2 sections (ICF + enrichment)
Frontend CourseDetailPage shows real data with no testimonials section
Frontend CourseDetailPage has 'Vorrei saperne di più' and 'Segnala il tuo interesse' CTAs
Frontend Events page shows 3 real events (Core Quadrant Pro Training, Webinar demo, Aperitivo coaching)
seed_data_creation: Backend seeds 7 real courses and 3 real events on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 verified real content migration. Backend: (1) GET /api/school/training-courses returns exactly 7 courses (3 ICF: cat_cc2026, cat_pcp2026, cat_tcp2026 + 4 enrichment: cat_cqpro, cat_visual, cat_teen, cat_advanced), (2) GET /api/community/events returns 3 real events (Core Quadrant Pro Training, Webinar demo, Aperitivo coaching), (3) Events are NOT mixed in training courses. Frontend: (1) WelcomePage has solid color hero, real school story, 3 real trainers with credentials, Calendly CTA, (2) TrainingCoursesPage has 2 sections (ICF + enrichment), (3) CourseDetailPage shows real data with no testimonials/stock photos, (4) Events page shows 3 real events. Fixed: MyJourneyPage CATEGORY_CONFIG missing keys for 'ariadne', 'tecnica', 'business' tabs.

bug_fixed.issue: MyJourneyPage runtime error: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'bg')
bug_fixed.root_cause: CATEGORY_CONFIG only had 'percorso_icf' and 'specializzazione' keys, but tabs used 'ariadne', 'tecnica', 'business' keys
bug_fixed.fix: Added legacy keys ('ariadne', 'tecnica', 'business') to CATEGORY_CONFIG for backward compatibility
